items.title_en: Tuesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.title_zh: 周二的重大股票故事：下一个交易日可能会影响市场的因素
items.desc_en: A turn higher in oil prices kept stocks under pressure on Monday. The Dow Industrials slid more than 300 points as Apple shares lost 2%.
items.desc_zh: 周一油价上涨令股市承压。苹果股价下跌 2%，道指下跌 300 多点。

items.title_en: Craft and keyboard: The trainees mastering tech and age-old skills
items.title_zh: 工艺和键盘：学员掌握技术和古老技能
items.desc_en: Firms have to balance hi-tech and age-old skills when training up young workers.
items.desc_zh: 企业在培训年轻工人时必须平衡高科技和古老技能。

items.title_en: Jamie Dimon says markets underestimate risks and he wouldn't buy stocks or Treasurys at current prices
items.title_zh: 杰米戴蒙表示市场低估了风险，他不会以当前价格购买股票或国债
items.desc_en: Comments from JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon contrast with investors' recent willingness to look past wars, tariffs and other shocks.
items.desc_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米戴蒙的言论与投资者最近愿意忽视战争、关税和其他冲击的态度形成鲜明对比。

items.title_en: Trump imposes 50% tariff on Canadian imports
items.title_zh: 特朗普对加拿大进口商品征收50%关税
items.desc_en: The duties mark a major escalation in trade tensions between the North American neighbours.
items.desc_zh: 这些关税标志着北美邻国之间的贸易紧张局势大幅升级。

items.title_en: Jim Cramer says it's time to look beyond tech as AI uncertainty rattles the market
items.title_zh: 吉姆·克莱默 (Jim Cramer) 表示，随着人工智能的不确定性扰乱市场，是时候将目光投向科技以外的领域了
items.desc_en: CNBC's Jim Cramer says the AI trade has become too unpredictable, making this a better time to put new money into high-quality companies outside of technology.
items.desc_zh: CNBC 的吉姆·克莱默 (Jim Cramer) 表示，人工智能行业变得过于不可预测，现在是向技术以外的优质公司投入新资金的更好时机。

items.title_en: Trump imposing 50% tariffs on certain Canadian goods over alleged trade discrimination
items.title_zh: 特朗普因涉嫌贸易歧视而对某些加拿大商品征收50%的关税
items.desc_en: Canada's relationship with the U.S. has frayed amid Trump's tariff-heavy agenda and vocal displeasure with the nations' trilateral trade pact with Mexico.
items.desc_zh: 由于特朗普的关税繁重议程以及对加拿大与墨西哥的三边贸易协定的公开不满，加拿大与美国的关系出现了紧张。

items.desc_zh: 尽管基本面依然强劲，但瑞银上市公司的股价却大幅下跌。

items.title_zh: 数千个因非法世界杯直播而被关闭的网站

items.title_zh: 泰特兄弟出庭接受引渡诉讼
items.desc_en: They were arrested on Saturday after the UK announced dozens of new charges, including rape and sex trafficking, which they deny.

items.title_en: Sen. Darline Graham running for full term to replace late brother Lindsey Graham
items.title_zh: 参议员达林·格雷厄姆 (Darline Graham) 竞选完整任期，接替已故弟弟林赛·格雷厄姆 (Lindsey Graham)

items.title_en: Could ‘The Odyssey’ lead the 'apes' back home to AMC shares?

items.desc_zh: 今天上午，AMC 期权大幅上涨，截至撰写本文时，交易量超过 300,000 份合约。

items.title_en: The FDA made a big reversal in its cyclosporiasis probe, but it still thinks iceberg lettuce is to blame
items.title_zh: FDA对其环孢子虫病调查做出重大逆转，但仍认为卷心生菜是罪魁祸首
items.desc_en: The FDA's investigation into the source of the cyclosporiasis outbreak is causing confusion as companies and consumers alike navigate new updates.
items.desc_zh: FDA 对环孢子虫病爆发来源的调查正在引起混乱，公司和消费者都在浏览新的更新。

items.title_en: Yemen's Houthis announce 'maritime embargo' on Saudi Arabia
items.title_zh: 也门胡塞武装宣布对沙特阿拉伯实施“海上禁运”
items.desc_en: The Houthis say the embargo begins immediately and is a response to a Saudi blockade of ports and airports in Yemen.
items.desc_zh: 胡塞武装表示，禁运立即开始，是对沙特封锁也门港口和机场的回应。

items.title_en: Notorious drug cartel leader Ismael Zambada sentenced to life in US prison
items.title_zh: 臭名昭著的贩毒集团头目伊斯梅尔·赞巴达在美国监狱被判处终身监禁
items.desc_en: Known as "El Mayo", the co-founder the Sinaloa Cartel was also ordered to pay $15bn after he admitted to sending vast amounts of drugs to the US.
items.desc_zh: 被称为“El Mayo”的锡那罗亚贩毒集团联合创始人在承认向美国运送大量毒品后也被勒令支付 150 亿美元。

items.title_en: Trump says Netanyahu won't be arrested in New York, pushing back on Mamdani
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示内塔尼亚胡不会在纽约被捕，反驳马姆达尼
items.desc_en: Israel's prime minister, Benjamin Netanyahu, is the target of an arrest warrant issued by the International Criminal Criminal Court related to the war on Gaza.
items.desc_zh: 以色列总理本杰明·内塔尼亚胡是国际刑事法院针对加沙战争发出的逮捕令的目标。

items.title_en: Paramount and Warner Bros. merger hit with temporary restraining order
items.title_zh: 派拉蒙和华纳兄弟的合并遭遇临时限制令
items.desc_en: A California judge granted a temporary restraining order as part of the lawsuit brought by state attorneys general due to antitrust concerns.
items.desc_zh: 作为州总检察长出于反垄断问题提起的诉讼的一部分，加州法官颁发了临时限制令。

items.title_en: Ofcom unable to take further legal action against suicide forum
items.title_zh: Ofcom 无法对自杀论坛采取进一步的法律行动
items.desc_en: The regulator said it had "no further legal routes available" under the Online Safety Act.
items.desc_zh: 该监管机构表示，根据《在线安全法》，“没有其他可用的合法途径”。

items.desc_zh: 载有 100 多人的客轮在圭亚那海岸沉没，数十人恐已死亡

items.title_en: Newcastle, Liverpool and England legend Keegan dies
items.title_zh: 纽卡斯尔、利物浦和英格兰传奇人物基冈去世
items.desc_en: Former England captain and manager Kevin Keegan dies at the age of 75, seven weeks after he revealed he had been diagnosed with stage four cancer.
items.desc_zh: 前英格兰队队长兼主教练凯文·基冈在透露自己被诊断出患有第四期癌症七周后去世，享年 75 岁。

items.title_en: Ten killed as Russian attacks on merchant ships in Black Sea intensify
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯加强对黑海商船的袭击造成十人死亡
items.desc_en: Russian strikes on the Odesa region have killed 28 people in July alone, local authorities say.
items.desc_zh: 地方当局称，仅 7 月份，俄罗斯对敖德萨地区的袭击就造成 28 人死亡。

items.title_en: Hamas names Khalil al-Hayya as new overall leader
items.title_zh: 哈马斯任命哈利勒·哈亚为新任总领导人
items.desc_en: The Palestinian armed group's Qatar-based chief negotiator replaces Yahya Sinwar, who was killed by Israeli forces in Gaza in 2024.
items.desc_zh: 巴勒斯坦武装组织驻卡塔尔的首席谈判代表接替了 2024 年在加沙被以色列军队杀害的叶海亚·辛瓦尔 (Yahya Sinwar)。

items.title_en: AliExpress fined record €550m by EU for allowing sale of illegal goods
items.title_zh: 全球速卖通因允许销售非法商品而被欧盟罚款创纪录的 5.5 亿欧元
items.desc_en: The Chinese retailer allowed unsafe toys and counterfeit clothes to be sold on its site, says the EU.
items.desc_zh: 欧盟表示，这家中国零售商允许在其网站上销售不安全的玩具和假冒服装。

items.title_en: Lamine Yamal celebrates World Cup win with little brother who charmed fans
items.title_zh: 拉明·亚马尔与迷倒球迷的弟弟一起庆祝世界杯胜利
items.desc_en: The three-year-old brother of Yamal has been hailed one of Spain's World Cup breakout stars by fans
items.desc_zh: 亚马尔三岁弟弟被球迷誉为西班牙世界杯新星之一

items.title_en: Rare identical quadruplets born in Australia
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚诞生罕见同卵四胞胎
items.desc_en: The parents of the four naturally-conceived girls were taken by "immense surprise" with the pregnancy, the hospital said.
items.desc_zh: 医院表示，这四名自然受孕女孩的父母对怀孕感到“非常惊讶”。

items.title_en: Police block thousands of 'cockroach' protesters marching on India's parliament
items.title_zh: 警方阻止数千名“蟑螂”抗议者向印度议会游行
items.desc_en: Some protesters demanding education reforms said they were injured in clashes with police who banned the march.
items.desc_zh: 一些要求教育改革的抗议者表示，他们在与禁止游行的警察发生冲突时受伤。

items.title_en: Oil prices erase gains after Iran says U.S. talks could be pursued based on national interests
items.title_zh: 伊朗称美国可以基于国家利益进行谈判后油价回吐涨幅
items.desc_en: American forces have started ninth consecutive night of strikes against Iranian targets.
items.desc_zh: 美军已连续第九晚对伊朗目标发动袭击。

items.title_en: JD Vance says wife Usha and son 'happy and healthy' after birth of fourth child
items.title_zh: JD万斯说妻子乌莎和儿子在第四个孩子出生后“快乐又健康”
items.desc_en: The couple welcomed their fourth child, Alec Neel Vance, on Sunday morning.
items.desc_zh: 周日早上，这对夫妇迎来了​​他们的第四个孩子，亚历克·尼尔·万斯 (Alec Neel Vance)。

items.desc_en: DOW Identifies Army Casualties  U.S. Department of War (.gov)Higher Iran war stakes, more Iran war questions  NBC NewsPentagon Withheld Dozens of U.S. Military Injuries in Iran War  The New York Times

items.title_en: Boy, 13, dies during World Cup celebrations in Spain
items.title_zh: 13岁男孩在西班牙世界杯庆祝活动中去世
items.desc_en: Two other young people were injured after a fountain partially collapsed in Salamanca's Ciudad Rodrigo.
items.desc_zh: 萨拉曼卡罗德里戈城一座喷泉部分倒塌，另外两名年轻人受伤。

items.title_en: FIFA emerges as the $9 billion winner as the biggest, brashest World Cup ever draws to a close
items.title_zh: 有史以来规模最大、最激烈的世界杯即将落下帷幕，FIFA 成为 90 亿美元的赢家
items.desc_en: The football governing body presided over the most lucrative sporting event in history and is poised to net over $9 billion in revenue for 2026.
items.desc_zh: 该足球管理机构主办了历史上最赚钱的体育赛事，预计到 2026 年净收入将超过 90 亿美元。

items.title_en: World Cup 2026 final in photos: Spain triumphs as football crowns a new champion

items.desc_en: Spain reclaimed football's biggest prize on Sunday, defeating Argentina 1-0 after extra time in a tense World Cup final.
items.desc_zh: 周日，西班牙队在紧张的世界杯决赛中通过加时赛以 1-0 击败阿根廷队，夺回了足球界的最高奖项。

items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.desc_zh: 此前，监管机构在五月份进行了一项审查，批评该平台对儿童来说“不够安全”。

items.desc_zh: Meta 本周发布了一项人工智能功能，可以让人们改变 Instagram 内容，但很快就引起了反弹。
